# BP-11 negative: defer outside loop
lang: go
file: BP-11-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"fmt"
	"os"
)

func OpenMany(paths []string) error {
	var files []*os.File
	for _, p := range paths {
		f, err := os.Open(p)
		if err != nil {
			return fmt.Errorf("open %s: %w", p, err)
		}
		files = append(files, f)
	}
	for _, f := range files {
		if err := f.Close(); err != nil {
			return fmt.Errorf("close file: %w", err)
		}
	}
	return nil
}
